search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Kept results on lastzwiki.com only. Prioritized concrete guide pages over home pages and excluded generic or off-topic pages.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Hero roster and equipment page; useful for hero discovery, factions, levels, and gear categories.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero list, factions, levels, and gear references.

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table page with category filters and cost-per-level data; useful for research discovery and cross-checking.
results.primary_user_job: Check research categories and badge costs by level.

results.title: Beginner's Guide - Last Z Wiki | How to Start & Essential Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: Entry-level guide that references early heroes, core systems, and progression order.
results.primary_user_job: Learn early-game progression and starter hero context.

search_records.query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.searched_query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.search_notes: Searched only www.last-z.wiki as required. No indexed pages matched this query. Consider trying narrower terms like hero names, event names, or specific guide labels on the same domain.
search_records.no_results_reason: No search results matched the approved domain query.

search_records.search_notes: Search was limited to the approved domain only. No matching pages were found for the query within the freshness window.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed or discoverable pages matched the approved domain query.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Search was restricted to lastz.fandom.com per instruction. Results were limited to discovery leads only and no public-claim readiness was assigned.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Daily event cycle page with a research-focused theme and a hero-focused theme; useful for cross-checking event tasks and rewards structure.
results.primary_user_job: Verify which event cycles use research and hero upgrades as point sources.
claims_to_verify: Which cycle is the research theme
How the six-cycle daily rotation repeats

results.title: Laboratory | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Research building page; confirms the Lab unlock and that it handles technology research, which fits research-event cross checks.
results.primary_user_job: Verify where technology research happens and when a second lab unlocks.
claims_to_verify: HQ level required to unlock the lab
Whether Lab No. 2 needs a Research License

results.title: Heroes | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Core hero system page; useful for linking hero upgrades, hero classes, and hero power to event-related upgrade mechanics.
results.primary_user_job: Cross-check hero upgrade terminology used by events.
claims_to_verify: Which upgrade inputs exist at a high level

search_records.search_notes: No indexed results found on www.packsify.com for the approved query within the allowed domain filter.
Search was restricted to mmediamreza.com only. Returned several Last Z-specific guides and one weekly event page; off-topic or generic pages were not included.

results.title: Military Center Guide: Maximize Unit Cap & Base Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide for a core base building that raises unit cap and base power; useful for checking military building unlocks and scaling.
results.primary_user_job: Verify military building function, unlock, and progression value.
claims_to_verify: Unit cap increase from Military Center
Upgradeable to level 30 and contributes base power

results.title: Rider Camp Guide: Train & Promote Rider Units - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Level-by-level training building guide for rider units with cap, speed, and power stats.
results.primary_user_job: Cross-check rider camp upgrade stats and training effects.

results.title: Weekly Lucky Number - Research Speed Bonu (May 18 - May 24) - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Weekly event note about a specific gift combination that grants a temporary research speed bonus.
results.primary_user_job: Check current weekly event bonus trigger and duration.
